name: Vapman Click Heating Element
summary: Keep your Vapman vaporiser performing at its best with the official Vapman Click Heating Element.
description: Keep your Vapman vaporiser performing at its best with the official Vapman Click Heating Element. Designed as a direct replacement part, this precision-engineered component restores the fast, even heating that makes Vapman sessions so smooth and flavorful. Constructed from high-grade, heat-resistant alloy, the Click Heating Element provides rapid warm-up and reliable temperature stability. Each draw remains clean, consistent, and full of rich vapour — ideal for both new and experienced Vapman users. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
